title: Email Intrusion Hunt
description: Opinionated email-intrusion hunt pack that starts from phishing, malicious delivery, and mailbox-compromise behaviors.
hypothesis_templates: Suspicious mail delivery and follow-on mailbox actions indicate a real user-targeted intrusion path rather than isolated spam.

execution_targets.name: M365 mailbox rule and forwarding sweep
execution_targets.description: Check for suspicious mailbox rules, auto-forwarding, and post-delivery tampering.

blind_spots: Forwarding or rule abuse in external mail systems will not appear unless they are routed back into the covered telemetry surfaces.
